content: Low-bit (<4bit) SoTA: AQLM (additive codebooks) is first Pareto-optimal <3 bits/param (~2.5bpp). QuIP# (Hadamard incoherence + E8P lattice codebooks) first PTQ where 3-bit beats 4-bit; 2-bit scales well. OmniQuant learns clipping+equivalent transform (LWC/LET) for W2A16/W4A4. GSQ (Gumbel-Softmax scalar) closes gap to vector-quant frontier at 2-3 bits, compatible with scalar kernels, applies to GGUF K-quants. HQQ = fast calibration-free (<5 min 70B). PTQ1.61 pushes ~1.6 bit. NanoQuant compresses to sub-1-bit via low-rank binary factorization (Llama2-70B 25.8x in 13h on H100). BitNet/1.58-bit requires training-from-scratch (out of Spectral-Stream scope — post-training only). BitNet/1.58-bit requires training.
